title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
content: “It's when you know you're licked before you begin but you begin anyway and you see it through no matter what.”

title: Cat on a Hot Tin Roof
author: Tennessee Williams
content: “Mendacity is a system that we live in. Liquor is one way out and death's the other.”
action: Identify the lies in your system.

title: Passing
author: Nella Larsen
content: “It was, she thought, all wrong. It was, she thought, a thing that couldn't be done.”

title: Look Homeward, Angel
author: Thomas Wolfe
content: “O lost, and by the wind grieved, ghost, come back again.”
